title: Will the Iran war deter sovereign investments?
summary: Laffer Tengler Investments CEO and CIO Nancy Tengler weighs in on whether the Iran war could influence or deter sovereign investment spending, especially for the AI ecosystem and Nvidia (NVDA). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

title: Tesla Rewires Future Around Optimus Robots As Leadership Turnover Raises Stakes
summary: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) plans to begin production of its third generation Optimus humanoid robot in Summer 2026. The company is sunsetting Model S/X production to reallocate capacity and resources toward mass manufacturing of Optimus Gen 3. Tesla is prioritizing robotics, autonomy, AI, and software services as core focus areas beyond its existing electric vehicle business. There has been a wave of executive departures in engineering, software, robotaxi, Cybertruck, and finance roles, raising...

title: Big Tech's Push to Make Electricity Cheaper
summary: A new coalition led by major tech firms says smarter grid utilization could lower electricity costs as AI-driven power demand rises.

title: Tesla’s China-Made EV Sales Just Nearly Doubled. Should You Buy TSLA Stock Now in Hopes of an Auto Business Rebound?
summary: A sharp jump in Tesla’s China deliveries signals possible demand recovery, yet slowing EV growth and AI spending raise doubts.

title: Tesla Stock Marks 4-Week Losing Streak Despite China Sales Data
summary: Tesla  stock couldn’t hold onto its early Friday gains, ending the session lower as shares failed to get an assist from Chinese sales data.  The move came after Chinese automotive information providers released some sales data.  It’s a big jump, but February 2025 sales data were impacted by plant downtime to upgrade equipment for an updated Model Y.

title: Musk Says xAI Must Be Rebuilt as Co-Founders Exit
summary: One by one, the founding team of xAI is leaving the artificial intelligence company as  Elon Musk  pushes for a complete reorganization.  The departures are part of bigger changes in recent weeks that have shrunk the original team that helped Musk launch the creator of the Grok chatbot.  The shakeup comes just over a month after Musk merged xAI into his rocket company SpaceX in a deal that valued xAI at $250 billion.

title: Musk Says xAI Is Being Rebuilt After Early Missteps
summary: Leadership changes and restructuring follow departures of several co-founders.

title: This Is Elon Musk's Latest Optimus 3 Production Timeline
summary: CEO Elon Musk said Tesla will release a new design of its Optimus robot every year. Tesla stock edged lower for the week, fighting for key support.

title: Tesla receives FTC clearance to convert investment in xAI into SpaceX stake
summary: Filings with the U.S. Federal Trade Commission list Tesla (TSLA) as the acquirer of a stake in SpaceX from Elon Musk, who is CEO of both companies and the documents, dated March 11, also show Musk selling holdings to investors including Valor Equity Partners and DFJ Growth.
